fixes.origin:
SecretKeySpec key = new SecretKeySpec(keyBytes, "DES");

Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance("DES");
fixes.replacement:
SecretKeySpec key = new SecretKeySpec(keyBytes, "AES");

Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance("AES");

static_findings.vulnerability: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
static_findings.message: Cipher.getInstance("DES") uses DES, which is an outdated and insecure encryption algorithm.
